title: Weird Pirated Games: Harry Potter NES
description:
One of the many harry potter bootlegs on the NES, in this one Harry Potter is apparently a Taekwondo fighter that battles dogs and body-slamming sumo wrestlers.

The gameplay is slow and tedious, you only have one move (kick) and the hit detection is completely broken... overally a mediocre game.
